data.content:
Implementation review: APPROVED. All 10 acceptance criteria met, verified by tests:
1. PASS for cold=old-terminal-only — covered by check_passes_when_cold_holds_only_old_terminal_knots (unit + CLI).
2. Idempotency — covered by fix_is_idempotent_after_clearing_violations.
3. Three invariants detected — covered by check_warns_on_{shadow,non_terminal_cold,stale_terminal_hot}_rows + combined.
4. Detail format + JSON data fields — verified in tests; data carries shadow, non_terminal_cold, stale_terminal_hot, hot_count, cold_count.
5. --fix resolves each invariant — fix_{prunes_shadow,rehydrates_non_terminal,drops_cold_pointer_when_events_missing,demotes_stale_terminal} tests.
6. Steady-state regression — fix_passes_again_after_simulated_steady_state_cycle.
7. COLD_TIER_HOT_TARGET removed; no rehydrate-up-to-100 path remains.
8. CLI test replaced (passes_when_cold_holds_only_old_terminal_knots), rehydrate-up-to-100 test removed, shadow CLI test updated for new detail format.
9. make sanity passes (fmt + clippy -D warnings + file-size + 1112 unit tests + tarpaulin 95.11% > threshold).
10. docs/tier-balance.md on main with two Mermaid diagrams.
